2606.13289.title: HYDRA-X: Native Unified Multimodal Models with Holistic Visual Tokenizers
2606.13289.paper_summary: Holistic visual tokenizers are fundamental to unified multimodal models (UMMs) as they map diverse visual inputs into a unified representation space. In this paper, we present HYDRA-X, the first UMM that unifies image and video tokenization within a single Vision Transformer (ViT). Our design is driven by two core challenges: efficiently injecting spatiotemporal reconstruction capability into a native ViT, and embedding image- and video-level semantic awareness into the latent space. To address the first, comprehensive ablations reveal two key findings: (1) frame-level causal temporal attention suffices for visual reconstruction, whereas full spatiotemporal attention degrades it; and (2) hierarchical temporal compression substantially outperforms single-step alternatives. To tackle the second, we propose a lightweight decompressor that upsamples temporally compressed features under joint image-video teacher supervision, thereby enforcing complementary semantic structures within the compact latent space. Building on this holistic tokenizer, we further propose a principled improvement of the editing pipeline: source-target interaction should occur at the latent level inside the tokenizer rather than at the semantic level inside the LLM, substantially improving editing consistency and accelerating convergence. Instantiated at the 7B dense model, HYDRA-X achieves strong performance across image and video understanding and generation tasks, paving the way for future unified-tokenizer UMMs.
2606.13289.paper_summary_zh: 整體視覺標記器對於統一多模態模型（UMMs）至關重要，因為它們將多樣的視覺輸入映射到統一的表示空間。在本文中，我們提出了HYDRA-X，首個在單一視覺Transformer（ViT）中統一圖像和視頻標記化的UMM。我們的設計受到兩個核心挑戰的驅動：有效地將時空重建能力注入原生ViT，以及將圖像和視頻級別的語義意識嵌入潛在空間。為了解決第一個問題，全面的消融實驗揭示了兩個關鍵發現：（1）幀級因果時間注意力足以進行視覺重建，而完全的時空注意力則會降低其效果；（2）分層時間壓縮顯著優於單步替代方案。為了解決第二個問題，我們提出了一種輕量級的解壓器，該解壓器在聯合圖像-視頻教師監督下對時域壓縮特徵進行上採樣，從而在緊湊的潛在空間內強化互補的語義結構。在這個整體標記器的基礎上，我們進一步提出了一種原則性的編輯流程改進：源-目標交互應該在標記器內的潛在層級進行，而不是在LLM內的語義層級進行，這大大提高了編輯一致性並加速了收斂。在7B密集模型中實現的HYDRA-X在圖像和視頻理解及生成任務中取得了強勁的表現，為未來的統一標記器UMMs鋪平了道路。
2606.13289.author: Guozhen Zhang et.al.
2606.13289.authors: Guozhen Zhang, Xuerui Qiu, Yutao Cui, Tianhui Song, Changlin Li, Junzhe Li, Tao Huang, Xiao Zhang, Yang Li, Jianbing Wu, Miles Yang, Zhao Zhong, Liefeng Bo, Limin Wang
